entry.title: amazon road construction mst
Amazon
50. Pow(x, n)
entry.content:
LeetCode

Approach 1: Brute Force, Time complexity: O(n), Time Limit Exceeded

Approach 2: Fast Power Algorithm Recursive, Time complexity: O(logn)

Approach 3: Fast Power Algorithm Iterative, Time complexity: O(logn), Space complexity: O(1)

entry.title: 49. Group Anagrams
entry.content:
LeetCode

Approach 1: Categorize by Sorted String, Time Complexity: O(NKlogK)

Approach 2: Categorize by Count, Time Complexity: O(NK)

entry.title: 46. Permutations
entry.content:
LeetCode

Approach 1: Backtracking

Approach 2: using permutation generation -> Heap Algorithm

entry.title: 45. Jump Game II
entry.content:
LeetCode

Approach 1: Brute Force, Time Complexity: O(2^N)

Approach 2: Greedy, Moving Forward, O(N) time and O(1) space.

entry.title: 44. Wildcard Matching
entry.content:
LeetCode

Approach 1: Brute Force -> Recursion, Time Limit Exceeded

Bottom up DP, Time complexity: O(SP) link

Top Down DP -> Recursion + Memoization link

Recursion

DP: recursion + memoization

entry.title: prepositions of time
entry.content: Prepostions of time. REF

entry.title: 42. Trapping Rain Water
entry.content:
LeetCode

Approach 1: Brute force, Time complexity: O(n^2)


Approach 2: Dynamic Programming, Time complexity: O(n)

Approach 3: Using stacks, Time complexity: O(n)

Approach 4: Using 2 pointers, Time complexity: O(n), Space complexity: O(1)
